dealSummary: California-based Upscale AI is in talks to raise a new funding round that would value the startup at about $2 billion, Bloomberg reported.
Factory, a startup developing AI agents for software engineering, secured a $150 million Series C led by Khosla Ventures at a $1.5 billion valuation.
Logistics platform developer Loop received a $95 million Series C led by Valor Equity Partners and the Valor Atreides AI Fund.
leadInvestors: Valor Equity Partners, the Valor Atreides AI Fund

dealSummary: Ulysses, a startup developing autonomous underwater robots to help restore marine habitats, raised a $38 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz.
Digital business management platform developer Nas.com secured a $27 million Series A led by Khosla Ventures.
AI analytics startup TextQL raised a $17 million round led by Blackstone Innovations Investments, Fortune reported.
Swedish semiconductor startup AlixLabs raised a €15 million Series A from investors including Stephen Industries.
Zenskar, the developer of a billing and revenue automation platform, raised a $15 million Series A led by investors including Susquehanna Venture Capital, Bessemer Venture Partners and Shine Capital.
leadInvestors: Susquehanna Venture Capital, Bessemer Venture Partners, Shine Capital

dealSummary: Eigen, the developer of an AI companion platform, secured a $15 million seed round from Benchmark.
